posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community

Reinier and Claudia from automagical.work here.

We’ve been developing a calendar replacement for the past two months or so. It’s now at a stage where we want to share it more widely!

Calendar Plus (marketplace)

Important office events7380×624 343 KB

First of all, we’re really happy to say that the must-have features of our calendar are free.

  • Item events have durations by way of a second date column.
  • Public holidays for almost every country on this globe.
  • A year view — Get a bird’s eye view of the year.
  • Milestone indicators — Don’t let that deadline whoosh by.
  • Show the days you need — Wednesday to Sunday? No problem.

And we recently added more powerful features to our Pro plan:

  • See who’s assigned to items
  • Display status, location, and more — Important information at a glance.

More is on the way! Hopefully this is the upgrade you need.

Calendar Plus in the marketplace

–
Reinier
Co-founder of automagical.work
